required_agents_phrases: This repository is permanently operated as a multi-agent AI-first repo.
This repo is shared by multiple AIs.
Write for the next agent, not for your own memory.

frontier_policy.when_human_only_work_remains: Do not invent a new technical plan. Keep the human frontier explicit.
frontier_policy.when_new_technical_work_is_clear: Replace ai/current-plan.md in the same cycle.
